title: Automation Organization - Would be helpful

posts.author: smizerak (Steve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. It would be great to see some updates to the page where you can look at your automations created. Two issues.

  1. It would be helpful to be able to drag and drop reorder the automation blocks, so someone can look at them from a flow perspective
  2. It would be helpful if we could READ the full automations, with multiple levels, in some better format than what currently exists

Thank you!
Steve

posts.author: DMarken (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml: We have SO MANY automations and I love them all but it’s so hard to keep track sometimes. Being able to group them into folders or move them around in a custom order at least would be very helpful!
